zh.lifeSummary: Oliver Champernowne是Sir Richard Champernowne和Elizabeth Valletort的兒子，於大約1300年出生在英國戴文。他於1327年與Egelina Vautort在英國英格蘭戴文諾斯 塔福頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1346年之前在他的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: Champernowne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Cambernon in Manche.

nameMeanings.name: Oliver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French name, Olivier, recorded as the name of one of Charlemagne's paladins (retainers), the close companion in arms of Roland in the Chanson de Roland. Whereas Roland is headstrong and rash, Oliver is thoughtful and cautious. Ostensibly this name derives from Late Latin olivarius ‘olive tree’ ( compare Olive ), but Charlemagne's other paladins all bear solidly Germanic names, so it is more probably an altered form of a Germanic name, perhaps distantly connected with Old Norse Óleifr ‘ancestral relic’. It has remained in more or less continuous use since the medieval period, becoming ever more popular since the 1980s.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Oliver Champernowne was born about 1300, in Devon, England as the son of Sir Richard Champernowne and Elizabeth Valletort. He married Egelina Vautort in 1327, in North Tawton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 1346, in his hometown.

ja.lifeSummary: Oliver Champernowneは約1300年にイギリスデボンでSir Richard ChampernowneとElizabeth Valletortの息子として生まれた。1327年にイギリスイギリスデボンノース タウトンでEgelina Vautortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Oliver Champernowne(은)는 대략 1300년 영국 데폰에서 Sir Richard Champernowne(와)과 Elizabeth Valletort의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1327년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 노르스 타w턴에서 Egelina Vautort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Oliver Champernowne родился около 1300 г. в местности девон, Англия. Его родителей звали Sir Richard Champernowne и Elizabeth Valletort. Он женился на женщине по имени Egelina Vautort в 1327 г. в местности норт тавтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 1346 г. в его родном городе.
